'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 79''' was the seventy-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 2]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*The [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]
*[[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]]
*[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] - Lake Dwellings
*[[Inferno firefighting robo|Inferno Firefighting Robo]]
*[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Field Equipment]]
*[[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class Cruiser]]
